infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: CheckUpp needs access to your calendar to help you schedule and manage checkups.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CheckUpp needs access to your camera for taking photos during checkups and scanning documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CheckUpp needs access to your photo library to let you upload or share medical images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CheckUpp uses your location to suggest nearby health facilities and provide location-based services.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: CheckUpp may use your identifier for personalized content and analytics.
infoPlist.UNUserNotificationCenterUsageDescription: CheckUpp uses notifications to remind you about upcoming appointments and updates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CheckUpp may use the microphone if you record audio notes during a checkup.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: CheckUpp may access your contacts if you choose to invite others or share checkup details.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: CheckUpp may use Bluetooth to connect with health devices near you.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: CheckUpp may use Bluetooth to detect and communicate with health monitoring devices.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: CheckUpp may access your health data to provide better insights and recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: CheckUpp may update your health data to sync checkup results.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: CheckUpp may access reminders to help you manage health-related tasks.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: CheckUpp may access motion data to track activity levels and provide wellness insights.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: CheckUpp may use Face ID for secure login and account verification.
